title: The Misleading Lady
writer: Charles W. Goddard, Paul Dickey, Lois Zellner
actors: Bert Lytell, Lucy Cotton, Frank Currier
plot: Jack Craigen, an engineer who has just finished a construction job in South Africa, returns to New York. There, at the home of his Uncle Cannell, he meets stage-struck society girl Helen Steele and her playwright fiancé Tracey. Sc...
